title: H&M India Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: H&M India Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
H&M India Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About H&M India Global Group:
H&M India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H&M India Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
